The bioactive constituents of Monochasma brachybotrys include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. 

The most common herbal preparations made with Monochasma brachybotrys include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
